case_title: WREN RONALD R. ADVERTISING INC. VS SHAMBLOTT STEVEN C/O INSTITUTE FOR ADVANCED TECH.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WREN RONALD R. ADVERTISING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAMBLOTT STEVEN C/O INSTITUTE FOR ADVANCED TECH. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
LETTER FROM STEVEN SHAMLOTT RECEIVED BY THE COURT INVOKING CCP 116.340 (D),(E) & (F)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAMBLOTT STEVEN C/O INSTITUTE FOR ADVANCED TECH. DEFT LIVES OUT OF STATE AND WAS NOT SERVED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
